languages.text: "Думаете, я не понимаю? Такой человек не может томиться здесь. Он важен для династии, для всего Простора Коронус! Но горькая правда в том, что я не знаю, как ему помочь". {n}Сенешаль едва не рычит от осознания собственной беспомощности.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Думаете, я не понимаю? Такой человек не может томиться здесь. Он важен для династии, для всего простора! Но горькая правда в том, что я не знаю, как ему помочь". {n}Сенешаль едва не рычит от осознания собственной беспомощности.{/n}

languages.text: "You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Думаете, я не понимаю? Такой человек не может томиться здесь. Он важен для династии, для всего Простора Коронус! Но горькая правда в том, что я не знаю, как ему помочь". {n}Сенешаль едва не рычит от осознания собственной беспомощности.{/n}

"You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}

"You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}

languages.text: “你以为我不知道吗？像塞贝里安那样的人物，不该被困在这里消磨生命。他对王朝、对整个扩区都至关重要！但可悲的是，我根本不知道该怎么帮他。”{n}总领意识到自己的无能为力，近乎低吼地吐出这番话。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你以为我不知道吗？像塞贝里安那样的人物，不该被困在这里消磨生命。他对王朝、对整个扩区都至关重要！但可悲的是，我根本不知道该怎么帮他。”{n}总领意识到自己的无能为力，近乎低吼地吐出这番话。{/n}

languages.text: « Je ne vous ai pas {mf|attendu|attendue} pour m'en rendre compte. Un homme comme Seberian ne devrait pas croupir ici. Il est indispensable, pour la dynastie comme pour l'ensemble des Étendues ! Mais la triste vérité, c'est que je ne sais pas comment l'aider. » {n}La sénéchale enrage à l'aveu de sa propre impuissance.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vous ai pas {mf|attendu|attendue} pour m'en rendre compte. Un homme comme Seberian ne devrait pas croupir ici. Il est indispensable, pour la dynastie comme pour l'ensemble des Étendues ! Mais la triste vérité, c'est que je ne sais pas comment l'aider. » {n}La sénéchale enrage à l'aveu de sa propre impuissance.{/n}

languages.text: "Bunu bilmediğimi mi sanıyorsunuz? Seberian gibi bir adam burada çürüyemez. Kendisi hanedanlık için, tüm Enginlik için hayati öneme sahip! Fakat acı gerçek şu ki ona nasıl yardım edeceğimi bilmiyorum." {n}Seneşal, kendi çaresizliğini fark etmesiyle âdeta hırlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bunu bilmediğimi mi sanıyorsunuz? Seberian gibi bir adam burada çürüyemez. Kendisi hanedanlık için, tüm Enginlik için hayati öneme sahip! Fakat acı gerçek şu ki ona nasıl yardım edeceğimi bilmiyorum." {n}Seneşal, kendi çaresizliğini fark etmesiyle âdeta hırlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Cree que no lo sé? Un hombre como Seberian no puede marchitarse aquí. Es vital para la dinastía, ¡para toda la Extensión! Pero la amarga verdad es que no sé cómo ayudarle». {n}La Senescal casi gruñe al comprender su impotencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Cree que no lo sé? Un hombre como Seberian no puede marchitarse aquí. Es vital para la dinastía, ¡para toda la Extensión! Pero la amarga verdad es que no sé cómo ayudarle». {n}La Senescal casi gruñe al comprender su impotencia.{/n}

languages.text: "Denkt Ihr, das weiß ich nicht? Ein Mann wie Seberian darf hier nicht versauern. Er ist wichtig für die Dynastie und die gesamte Ausdehnung! Aber die bittere Wahrheit ist, ich weiß nicht, wie ich ihm helfen kann." {n}Die Truchsessin ist angesichts ihrer eigenen Hilflosigkeit sichtlich zerknirscht.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Denkt Ihr, das weiß ich nicht? Ein Mann wie Seberian darf hier nicht versauern. Er ist wichtig für die Dynastie und die gesamte Ausdehnung! Aber die bittere Wahrheit ist, ich weiß nicht, wie ich ihm helfen kann." {n}Die Truchsessin ist angesichts ihrer eigenen Hilflosigkeit sichtlich zerknirscht.{/n}

languages.text: 「あなたが知らないと思っているのですか？シベリアのような男は、ここで苦しむことはできません。彼は王朝、そして広大な宇宙にとって不可欠なのです。でも、苦い真実を言わせてもらえば、私は彼を助ける方法を知りません」{n}執事長は、自分の無力さに気づいて、ほとんど唸るように言った。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You think I don't know that? A man like Seberian cannot languish here. He is vital to the dynasty, to the whole Expanse! But the bitter truth is that I don't know how to help him." {n}The Seneschal almost snarls at the realisation of her own helplessness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが知らないと思っているのですか？シベリアのような男は、ここで苦しむことはできません。彼は王朝、そして広大な宇宙にとって不可欠なのです。でも、苦い真実を言わせてもらえば、私は彼を助ける方法を知りません」{n}執事長は、自分の無力さに気づいて、ほとんど唸るように言った。{/n}
